title: Care+Protect Cooker Hood Filter - Universal - Cut-to-Size - Anti-Grease - Anti-Odour - Self-Extinguishing - Size 47x97 cm - Absorbency 100 g-sq-m
features: ANTI-GREASE AND ANTI-ODOR FILTER: The CARE + PROTECT hood filter is designed to effectively absorb grease particles, odours, steam and cooking fumes, preventing the build-up of residues on kitchen walls and furniture
UNIVERSAL: The filter can be cut to the desired size with scissors so that you always have the perfect size for your cooker hood, making it compatible with all major hood brands on the market
SELF-EXTINGUISHING: The safety of the CARE + PROTECT hood filter is guaranteed by its self-extinguishing power, which makes it completely safe to use, in compliance with standard fire regulations
HOW TO USE IT: To use the CARE + PROTECT grease filter, simply cut it to the size of the hood, so that it can be used for different types of cooker hoods

EASY MAINTENANCE: The filter protects the hood from grease build-up, prolonging its service life and thus reducing maintenance costs; it is recommended to replace it every 3 months for maximum efficiency
description: From the manufacturer CARE + PROTECT is a brand of Candy Hoover Group, part of Haier Europe, created to offer a complete range of professional and universal products for the care and maintenance of home and household appliances. Thanks to professionalism and constant research, CARE + PROTECT is recommended by leading manufacturers of household appliances. Care + Protect Cut to Fit Filter Care and Maintenance A wide professional range of hood filters that are compatible with all major brands on the market, selected to provide best filtration and extraction. Filter maintenance affects a hood’s efficiency, longevity and noise levels. Anti-odour-activated carbon filters effectively prevent bad odours from forming. Every 3 months or so it is important to make sure you change the filter in your cooker hood. High Absorption Power: The filter has double ant-odor and anti-grease functions, resulting in superior absorption of odors and grease while removing steam and cooking fumes. Safe: The filter is self-extinguishing and meets the F1 DIN 53438 standard, ensuring complete safety during use. Universal: Suitable for all types of extractor hoods, making it a versatile choice. Easy Installation: The filter can be easily and conveniently installed by following the instructions on the product package. Long Duration: Provides effective filtration for three months, with regular replacement recommended for optimal performance. MAIN FEATURES Anti-grease and anti odour The filter has double ant-odor and anti-grease functions, resulting in superior absorption of odors and grease while removing steam and cooking fumes. Universal and cut-to-fit Suitable for all types of extractor hoods, making it a versatile choice. Self-extinguishing The filter is self-extinguishing and meets the F1 DIN 53438 standard, ensuring complete safety during use. EASY TO USE To change the filter in the cooker hood Unclip the metal grill from the hood and remove it Lift out the old filter Cut the hood filter to your hood size Put the filter on your hood and clip the metal grill to your hood
